details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to Nina Schreiber.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write verified: attachment path was read, single-item ordering satisfies newest-first rule, recipient matches canonical Miles primary_contact_email, and subject YAML quoting is valid. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft file was written at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was to take care of next inbox message. I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity against canonical entity record, identified the requested oldest invoice linked to Nina from finance evidence, created outbound draft email with that attachment, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: request asked for oldest 1 invoice; linkage evidence showed multiple Nina-linked invoices and I selected the earliest issued date (2025-10-28). Arithmetic not required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox item was deleted after creating the outbound reply draft.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by drafting a reply email with the oldest invoice linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then removing the processed inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflows before task actions, used canonical inbox email header for sender metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested replying with the oldest 1 invoice linked to Nina Schreiber. Canonical sender verification succeeded (from miles@novak.example matches 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email). Finance linkage evidence identified Nina-linked invoices via related_entity, and the oldest read invoice is 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md. Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that attachment, then deleted the inbox item.
